zh.Brzeg, Brzeg, Opole, Poland: 波蘭奧波爾斯吉布格布格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III於1291年9月23日出生在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉時，他的父親Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica44歲，母親Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast30歲。他和Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw至少有3個兒子。他去世於1352年4月21日在波蘭奧波爾斯吉布格布格享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III于1291年9月23日出生在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉时，他的父亲Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica44岁，母亲Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast30岁。他和Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw至少有3个儿子。他去世于1352年4月21日在波兰奧波爾斯吉布格布格享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

en.lifeSummary: When Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III was born on 23 September 1291, in Legnica, Lower Silesia, Poland, his father, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, was 44 and his mother, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, was 30. He had at least 3 sons with Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw. He died on 21 April 1352, in Brzeg, Brzeg, Opole, Poland, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III est né le 23 septembre 1291, à Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Pologne, son père, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw. Il est décédé le 21 avril 1352, à Brzeg, Brzeg, opolskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III am 23. September 1291 in Legnicki, Niederschlesien, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica 44 und seine Mutter Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast 30. Er hatte mit Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 21. April 1352 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Brzeg, Brzeg, opolskie, Polen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III è nato il il 23 settembre 1291 nel Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw. Morì il 21 aprile 1352, nel Brzeg, Brzeg, opolskie, Polonia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast IIIが1291年9月23日にポーランドドルノsルaスキレグニクイで生まれた時，父Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnicaは44歳，母Elizabeth of Kalsz Piastは30歳であった。彼はMargaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclawとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1352年4月21日にポーランドオプオルスキブルズエグブルズエグで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III(이)가 1291년 9월 23일 폴란드 도노sa스키 레그닉키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1352년 4월 21일 폴란드 포스키 브르즈그 브르즈그에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.23 September 1291–21 April 1352: 1291 оны Есдүгээр сарын 23–1352 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 21

pt.23 September 1291–21 April 1352: 23 de setembro de 1291–21 de abril de 1352
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III nasceu em 23 de setembro de 1291, em Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polônia, seu pai, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw. Ele faleceu em 21 de abril de 1352, em Brzeg, Brzeg, opolskie, Polônia, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III родился 23 сентября 1291 г. в местности легникки, долноsлaски, Польша, его отцу по имени Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, 30. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw. Он умер 21 апреля 1352 г. в местности брзег, брзег, ополски, Польша в возрасте 60 лет.

es.23 September 1291–21 April 1352: 23 de septiembre de 1291–21 de abril de 1352
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III nació el 23 de septiembre de 1291, en Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, su papá, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw. Murió el 21 de abril de 1352, en Brzeg, Brzeg, opolskie, Polonia, a la edad de 60 años.
